transcript:
Alice: We need to migrate to the new auth provider.
Bob: I strongly disagree. Our current setup works and the migration risk is huge.
Carol: I see Bob's point but our current provider is sunsetting next year.
Alice: Right. We don't have a choice on the timeline. Decision: we migrate, starting Q3.
Bob: Logged my objection. I'll still help with the migration plan.
Alice: Bob, please draft the migration plan by next Friday.
Carol: I'll handle the user-facing communication.
